meta.description: Act 3 social phase hub: The War Room, a hardened rebel command bunker on the edge of the Tangrene badlands. New contacts, vendors, and storylines for the Fractured Alliance arc.

intel-officer.name: Lieutenant Sera Kade
intel-officer.description: A sharp-eyed Mirialan intelligence officer who specializes in analyzing splinter faction movements. Her dossier on Warlord Drayen is the most complete in the sector.

defector-prisoner.name: Corporal Dax Moren
defector-prisoner.description: A captured defector trooper who claims he wants to come back to the rebellion. He knows the layout of Drayen's operations but his loyalty is questionable.

rebel-commander.name: Commander Talos Vane
rebel-commander.description: The veteran rebel commander is showing the strain. Drayen's rise has stretched his forces thin, and the defections have shaken his confidence in his own people.

tech-specialist.name: Rook
tech-specialist.description: A taciturn Ugnaught mechanic who salvages and repurposes captured warlord tech. She's fascinated by the prototype war droids and wants to study every piece you bring back.

scout.name: Fenwick Taal
scout.description: A lanky Bothan scout who runs reconnaissance on Drayen's patrols. His intelligence is good, but his survival instinct sometimes overrides his duty.

location.name: The War Room
location.description: A reinforced command bunker built into a cave system on the edge of the Tangrene badlands. Holographic tactical displays cast a blue glow over folding tables covered in datapads and ration packs. The air recyclers hum constantly, and the distant thud of artillery practice echoes through the rock.
location.narrativeIntro: The blast doors grind open as you descend into the rebel command bunker. The War Room buzzes with controlled urgency. Holographic maps of the sector flicker on every surface, red markers showing Drayen's known positions. Commander Vane stands at the central planning table, flanked by his officers. The mood is grim but determined. You've faced the Empire and the Syndicate. Now you face something more personal: a man who was once one of you.

encounters.name: Intelligence Briefing
encounters.description: Lieutenant Kade has assembled a dossier on Warlord Drayen and his splinter faction.
encounters.narrativeIntro: Sera Kade spreads a series of holoprojections across the table -- troop movements, intercepted communications, satellite imagery of the mountain stronghold. "I've been tracking Drayen since he broke from the Imperial remnant. He's methodical, patient, and dangerously intelligent. Here's what we know."

dialogueOptions.text: "Show me his deployment patterns. There has to be a weakness."

successOutcomes.hintText: Kade's analysis reveals that the prototype factory has a 30-minute gap in its patrol rotation during shift changes.

successOutcomes.description: Your tactical eye impresses the intelligence officer.

failureOutcomes.hintText: The data is too fragmented for a full analysis, but the factory appears to be lightly guarded.

triumphOutcomes.description: You spot a critical flaw in Drayen's command structure -- he trusts no one, which creates communication gaps.

dialogueOptions.text: "Let me cross-reference those intercepts with the relay station data we recovered."

successOutcomes.hintText: Cross-referencing reveals the stronghold's shield generator location and its power source.

successOutcomes.description: The combined intelligence is worth a bonus from rebel command.

failureOutcomes.description: The encryption is too complex. The data remains partially obscured.

encounters.name: The Defector's Confession
encounters.description: Corporal Dax Moren sits in a holding cell, hands cuffed to the table. He says he wants to talk.
encounters.narrativeIntro: "I know what you think of me," Dax says, his voice hollow. "I was with Drayen for six months. I saw what he's building. It scared me enough to let your scouts pick me up." He leans forward, chains clinking. "I'll tell you everything. But I want a deal."

dialogueOptions.text: "You're in no position to negotiate. Talk, or rot in this cell."

successOutcomes.hintText: Dax breaks and reveals the turncoat camp's location and the names of the three rebel defectors leading it.
successOutcomes.description: Turncoat camp location and leadership revealed.

failureOutcomes.description: Dax clams up. He won't talk without assurances.

dialogueOptions.text: "You did the right thing, Dax. Help us stop Drayen and we'll make sure command knows you cooperated."

successOutcomes.hintText: Dax opens up about the turncoat training methods. They drill conscripts using rebel battle formations.
Dax describes the fortress layout: the command tower is in the northeast, accessible only through the main courtyard.

failureOutcomes.hintText: Dax shares general information but holds back specifics. The camp is somewhere in the eastern jungle.

outcome.description: Dax reveals a hidden supply cache he stashed before defecting.

encounters.name: Commander's War Council
encounters.description: Commander Vane gathers his officers for a strategy session. Your input will shape the campaign's direction.
encounters.narrativeIntro: "We're fighting on three fronts," Vane says, gesturing at the holographic map. "Drayen's factory, his turncoat training camp, and his fortress. We don't have the forces to hit all three at once. I need your team to lead the critical strike."

dialogueOptions.text: "We hit the factory first. Cut off his droid supply, then mop up the rest."

successOutcomes.hintText: Vane assigns a diversionary strike team to draw off the factory's quick reaction force. You'll have a cleaner approach.

successOutcomes.description: Your strategic thinking earns Vane's respect.

failureOutcomes.hintText: Vane approves the plan but can't spare any support units. You're on your own.

dialogueOptions.text: "We need a bigger budget, Commander. Drayen's tech outclasses everything we have."

successOutcomes.description: Vane secures emergency war funds from the sector's provisional government.

failureOutcomes.description: The treasury is nearly empty, but Vane scrapes together what he can.

encounters.name: Scout Report
encounters.description: Fenwick returns from a reconnaissance run, dusty and rattled.
encounters.narrativeIntro: Fenwick slides into the booth across from you, fur matted with red dust. "I got close to the stronghold perimeter," he says, pulling up a hand-drawn map. "Closer than I wanted to. The place is crawling with droids." His whiskers twitch nervously.

dialogueOptions.text: "Walk me through the approach routes. What's the terrain like?"

successOutcomes.hintText: Fenwick identifies a dried riverbed that provides concealed access to the stronghold's southern wall.
successOutcomes.description: Concealed approach route to the stronghold.

failureOutcomes.hintText: Fenwick's map is rough but confirms the stronghold has at least two entry points.

dialogueOptions.text: "What do the locals say about Drayen? Any weak points in his support?"

successOutcomes.hintText: Local farmers report that Drayen's conscripts are poorly motivated. They fight because they're scared, not because they believe.

successOutcomes.description: Fenwick introduces you to a local who sells supplies at a discount.

failureOutcomes.description: The locals are too scared to talk. Drayen's reprisals have silenced the population.

confrontationEncounter.name: Final Reckoning with Torrin
confrontationEncounter.description: With the final assault approaching, this is your last chance to neutralize Vex Torrin before he undermines the entire operation.
confrontationEncounter.narrativeIntro: Torrin sits alone at the edge of the resistance camp, sharpening a vibroblade. He doesn't look up as you approach. "So. The endgame. I figured one of us would come looking for the other before this is over." He stands slowly, the blade catching the light. "Let's finish this."

dialogueOptions.text: "Drayen is going to crush you along with everyone else. I'm offering you a chance to walk away -- take it."
dialogueOptions.description: Force the rival to acknowledge the hopelessness of his position.

dialogueOptions.text: "We've been at each other's throats long enough. Fight with us against Drayen and there's a place for you after."
dialogueOptions.description: Appeal to the rival's survival instinct and offer an alliance.

dialogueOptions.text: "Drayen already knows you've been playing both sides. I intercepted the kill order. You need me more than you know."
dialogueOptions.description: Fabricate a threat to make the rival dependent on you.

confrontationEncounter.successNarrative: For the first time, Torrin drops his guard entirely. He sheathes the blade and nods once. "You win. I'm done hunting your shadow." He disappears into the night, his rivalry finally broken.
confrontationEncounter.failureNarrative: Torrin shakes his head with something almost like pity. "You never had what it takes." He disappears into the camp, no doubt already planning his next move against you.
confrontationEncounter.despairNarrative: Torrin not only rejects your approach but reveals he's been feeding information to Drayen's scouts. Your position may be compromised.

shops.name: Rook's Salvage Workshop
shops.description: A cluttered workshop carved into the cave wall. Rook has converted captured warlord tech into usable equipment. Everything smells like ozone and machine oil.

shops.name: Rebel Field Armory
shops.description: A neatly organized supply depot run by Commander Vane's logistics team. Limited selection, but everything is battle-tested.
